text_block_list.text:
I wait and wait, but Seiun Sky doesn't show up for
practice, so I head out and ask around to see
where she might be.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Seiun Sky? She said she was gonna go take
a nap in the library today.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for Seiun Sky, she said she was
off to pick crops in the fields.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Sky? I thiiink she said she was going to go
relax at a cafe.

I search everywhere, but she's nowhere to be
found. With no more leads, I head back to my
office.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... That was a nap and a half.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, looks like you fell for it—hook, line, and
sinker.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My scheme to show you how overworked you are,
I mean.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think you're pushing too hard lately?
C'mon, you need some rest, and that's that!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Less is more—know what I'm saying?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Buuut that's not gonna fly, is it? You're not
gonna budge, are ya? Teehee. ☆

I warn Seiun Sky quite sternly that she needs to
be more careful in the future.
